subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Abhá Kingdom! Divine and infinite bounty poureth down even as the showers of April clouds and the spring rains [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی فیض نامتناهی الهی چون فیضان ابر نیسانی و ریزش سحاب آذاری
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
